info.viSezaH: asya DAtoH vizaye sidDAntakOmudyAm ucyate - niSAmanaM cAkzuzajYAnamiti mADavaH  jYApanamAtramityanye  niSAnezviti pAWAntaram  niSAnaM tIkzRIkaraRam  ezvevArTezu jAnAtirmit  - iti  asya ASayaH ayam - DAtupAWe kryAdigaRe 9.43 ityatra nirdizwasya jYA-DAtoH 'niSAmanam' (= cAkzuzajYAnam  = getting knowledge with eyes) taTA ca 'tIkzRIkaraRam' (to sharpen)- etayoH arTayoH yadA prayogaH Bavati tadA saH DAtuH GawAdigaRe svIkartavyaH - iti  agre kOmudyAm ucyate - jYapa micceti curAdO  jYApanaM mAraRAdikaM ca tasyArTaH  iti  ityukte curAdigaRe 10.118 ityatra nirdizwasya jYap- DAtoH 'jYApanam mAraRam tozaRam' ityAdizu arTezu yadA prayogaH Bavati tadA saH api GawAdigaRe svIkartavyaH - iti  anena prakAreRa anyatra uktayoH dvayoH DAtvoH GawAdigaRanirdeSArTam eva atra tayoH samAnarUpeRa nirdeSaH kftaH asti  ataSca atra nirdizwaH jYA-DAtuH pfTak-DAturUpeRa nEva svIkaraRIyaH apitu anyatra pAWitayoH jYADAtvoH viSizwezu arTezu GawAdigaRaviDAnArTam anukaraRarUpeREva svIkartavyaH  ata: asya DAtoH pfTak rUpARi atra na dIyante  This dhatu is simply a common reference (placeholder) to the already-existing two dhatus 9.43 and 10.118 purely for the purpose of showing that those two dhatus are to be considered a part of GawAdigaRa when used with the specificed meanings. Therefore no separate forms have been given for this dhatu.
